nasb.text: He cast four rings of gold for it on its four feet; even two rings on one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.

esv.text: And he cast for it four rings of gold for its four feet, two rings on its one side and two rings on its other side.

cnv.text: 又鑄造了四個金環，安放在櫃的四腳上，這一邊兩個環，那一邊兩個環。

ccb.text: 他造了四个金环，安在柜的四个脚上，每边两个环，
